name: smart-ai-study-companion
description: Smart AI Study Companion - Monorepo Runner

scripts.fullstack: concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,frontend,worker" -c "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
